methodology: Insider sweep (Schefter/Rapoport/Pelissero/Breer/Graziano/Schrager/Schneider) + team-beat writers + PrizePicks live tracker. Strict date filter: reports filed 4/22. The draft begins 2026-04-23 8pm ET in Pittsburgh.

insider_reports.summary: Cardinals have shopped No. 3 with no takers. If they hold, Schefter believes Notre Dame RB Jeremiyah Love is the 'logical' pick. Trade-down odds lower than 4/20 because buyers never materialized.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Raise ARI P(Love @ 3) further; cut trade_down_rate to 0.18.

insider_reports.summary: Jets narrowed No. 2 to two edge rushers: Texas Tech EDGE David Bailey and Ohio State EDGE/LB Arvell Reese. Vegas books price them within 2 bps.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Lock NYJ @ 2 to Bailey/Reese binary; other positions ~0%.

insider_reports.summary: Jets cancelled top-30 visit with David Bailey this week. Ambiguous signal — may mean decision already made, either direction.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Do not move Bailey-to-NYJ probability on this alone; flag volatility.

insider_reports.summary: Browns open to trading down from 6. Named trade-up partners: KC, NYG, MIA, LAR, WAS. Berry's analytics front office has circulated the offer across the league.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Hold CLE trade_down_rate at 0.70; surface the named partner list in Mock Lab trade scenarios.

insider_reports.summary: John Schneider: 'We have four picks. We'll be looking to trade back.' Confirms 4/20 chatter — Seattle very likely to ship 32.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Push SEA trade_down_rate to 0.75.

insider_reports.summary: Jerry Jones: 'We have trades... Picks or players, you could imagine that.' Stephen Jones: not required to keep both first-round picks (12, 20). Cowboys fielding up- and down-calls.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep DAL trade_up 0.40 / trade_down 0.45; add player-trade branch.

insider_reports.summary: Teams 'could try to trade up to 15 or 16' to jump Lions at 17 for an OT. Named: CAR, PHI, SF, plus others. Lions have significant OT need and a top tackle may not last to 17.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Raise DET trade_up_rate to 0.50; flag OT-run scenario for picks 13-16.

insider_reports.summary: Pelissero: 'Would be surprised if Beck is not off the board in round two.' A team could trade up into bottom of R1 for Beck. Miami QB, consensus QB3.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Cap Beck R1 probability ~20%; late-R1 trade-up branch live (MIA, PIT, CLE partners).

insider_reports.summary: Steelers priced +330 favorite to draft Beck (second to Dolphins). Rodgers silence continues; PIT still QB-market though beat writers say 'not in Round 1.' OT first-round lock unless Beck falls further than expected.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep PIT OT R1 primary branch; Beck R2/R3 branch.

insider_reports.summary: Tennessee CB Jermod McCoy's draft range has widened considerably post-ACL. 'Wide range of outcomes' — slide to Round 2 now materially likely.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Move McCoy R1 probability <0.35.

insider_reports.summary: Louisville WR Chris Bell ahead of schedule on ACL rehab, running 18+ mph per his agent. Pre-injury first-round grade; now back on Day 2 radar.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Bump Bell R2 probability; add late-R1 dart for OL/WR-desperate teams.

insider_reports.summary: Teams received letter Wednesday confirming Banks (Florida IDL) had CT scan revealing foot healing; full football clearance expected early June. Jeremiah 51st overall.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Banks Day 2 lock; IDL-needy teams can trust the clearance.

insider_reports.summary: Miami OT Francis Mauigoa diagnosed with herniated disc; asymptomatic but some teams think surgery is 'when, not if.' Could cause slide.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Increase Mauigoa variance; OT-need teams at 13-16 may take cleaner tackle instead.

insider_reports.summary: Schefter listed 8 players who could be traded for picks during draft: QBs Anthony Richardson (IND), Will Levis (TEN), Spencer Rattler (NO), plus Alvin Kamara (NO), Cameron Jordan (FA), Dexter Lawrence (already done to CIN, noted), and others. Draft-day veteran-trade branch is live.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Flag IND/TEN/NO as potential late-R1/early-R2 capital gainers via veteran trades.

insider_reports.summary: Saints open to BPA at 8. Would take Carnell Tate quickly if on the board (Ohio State reunion with Chris Olave). Kamara/Cameron Jordan futures could pivot on draft outcome. OC Doug Nussmeier excused from draft duties (son in draft).
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep NO BPA-heavy at 8; raise Tate P(NO @ 8) if on board.

insider_reports.summary: Giants at 5: most likely Jeremiyah Love (if there) or Caleb Downs. At 10: Styles, Downs, Tate, or Love all in play, plus post-Lawrence IDL.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep NYG 5/10 dual-pick logic; IDL need at 10 confirmed.

insider_reports.summary: Titans want to trade down from 4. If they hold and Bailey is there, strong Bailey candidate. Otherwise highest-graded WR between Carnell Tate and Jordyn Tyson.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Raise TEN trade_down_rate to 0.45; add WR branch (Tate/Tyson) as secondary.

insider_reports.summary: Commanders focused on Sonny Styles, Caleb Downs, Carnell Tate, and Jeremiyah Love at 7.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Narrow WAS @ 7 candidate set; downweight other positions.

insider_reports.summary: Vikings 'will draft a defensive player' per Schefter. Aligns with Brian Flores scheme premium on DBs / front seven.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Push MIN offense probability near 0 at 24; DB/EDGE dominant.

insider_reports.summary: Schefter: 'hard to imagine' Tyson falling past top 10. KC, NO, NYG named as landing spots.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Raise Tyson P(top 10).

insider_reports.summary: Anonymous GM: 'one of the best safeties I've seen' and said he'd take Stukes ahead of Caleb Downs. Arizona safety now a first-round lock.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Elevate Stukes R1 probability; variance bump relative to Downs.

insider_reports.summary: Chiefs targets at 9 narrowed: Rueben Bain (EDGE) if there, else Jordyn Tyson (WR). Trade-up to 3-4 for a top EDGE also live per Veach chatter.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep KC trade_up at 0.25; add Bain/Tyson primary target set at 9.

insider_reports.summary: Schrager's final mock projects 4 major trades dominating R1. Eagles and Saints among teams trading up. Cowboys mentioned as potential trade-up partner.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Cross-reference with our trade scenarios; cap overall R1-trades at 3-5 simulated.

insider_reports.summary: Dolphins 'in the QB market.' Have picks 11 and 30 — could package for a QB or take one at 11 if Mendoza doesn't go 1.
insider_reports.impact_on_model: Keep MIA QB need R1-tier; Beck late-R1 trade-up branch points to MIA.
